subcodes.first_line: O Husayn! Thou hast purposed to attain the Ultimate Goal, and turned thy face toward the Most Exalted Summit and the Supreme Horizon, and through the bounties [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا حسین قصد مقصد اقصی نمودی و بذروه علیا و افق اعلی اقبال کردی و از عنایات
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual transformation, @consolation and comfort, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
